title: frumentum sylvaticum
intro: Frumentum sylvaticum, also known as Wild Rye Grass, is a plant species native to North America, characterized by its tall, slender stems and feathery panicles. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits associated with Frumentum sylvaticum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues. Frumentum sylvaticum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
